source.title: Your RAG Benchmark Is Lying to You and I Have the Numbers to Prove It
source.author: Longjumping-Unit-420 (Candlekeep)

objective: Never forget information we should remember — zero information loss

extracted_concepts.name: Context prefixing at ingestion
extracted_concepts.description: Prepend document title + description to every chunk BEFORE embedding. Same content in different contexts embeds differently. Zero query-time cost.
extracted_concepts.evidence: MRR -0.042, nDCG -0.144 when removed (largest single-technique impact)

extracted_concepts.name: Semantic chunk expansion
extracted_concepts.description: Return adjacent chunks around matches, gated by query-embedding similarity.
extracted_concepts.evidence: +17.9pp content match, zero MRR change. Similarity-weighted expansion cuts noise by 22%.

extracted_concepts.name: Query-type-aware thresholding
extracted_concepts.description: Lexical queries score lower on vector similarity. Relax threshold for lexical, keep strict for semantic.

extracted_concepts.name: Content completeness over rank position
extracted_concepts.description: Agents read everything returned. Position 1 with a fragment is worse than position 2 with full context.
extracted_concepts.evidence: Naive reranker beats on MRR but loses graded nDCG by 50%. LangChain MRR 0.535, nDCG 0.202.

extracted_concepts.name: Score distribution drift
extracted_concepts.description: Corpus growth shifts score distributions. Threshold calibrated at N memories over-filters at 10N.
extracted_concepts.evidence: BEIR validation showed 44% nDCG drop on different domain corpus

extracted_concepts.name: BM25 anchoring against semantic drift
extracted_concepts.description: Multi-hop follow-ups drift into paraphrases. BM25 grounds to specific terms.
extracted_concepts.evidence: Already implemented in shodh via hybrid search

extracted_concepts.name: Agent-side decomposition > tool-side
extracted_concepts.description: Don't implement inside the tool what the agent already does.
extracted_concepts.evidence: Already partially applicable — shodh has internal decomposition for non-agent callers

boundary_1.name: Embedding Input ↔ Context Metadata
boundary_1.issue: extract_searchable_text() appends context; deferred embed_and_index() uses raw content only. Two different embedding paths produce inconsistent similarity scores.
boundary_1.data_crossing: RichContext fields → embedding input string → chunk boundaries → vector space
boundary_1.failure_mode: Early chunks of long memories embed without context. Layer 3.5 brute-force uses worse embeddings than Vamana index.

boundary_2.name: Query Classification ↔ Relevance Thresholds
boundary_2.issue: Query type is computed but never propagates to threshold selection.
boundary_2.failure_mode: Lexical attribute queries like 'What is SHO-72?' pass through same threshold as semantic queries.

boundary_3.name: Decay Function ↔ Retrieval Eligibility
boundary_3.issue: IMPORTANCE_FLOOR (0.05) × max_confidence (1.0) = 0.05 < ABSTENTION_THRESHOLD (0.1). Every decayed memory is permanently hidden.
boundary_3.failure_mode: Permanent forgetting trap — contradicts the stated design intent of IMPORTANCE_FLOOR.

context_differentiation.micro_embedding: BROKEN — all content embeds without origin context

axes.name: Information-Theoretic
axes.finding: Embedding entropy bottleneck: context-free chunks carry zero bits about origin. Context prefixing saves ~2.3 bits per chunk (log(5) for typical project diversity).

axes.name: Temporal Dynamics
axes.finding: IMPORTANCE_FLOOR × ABSTENTION_THRESHOLD creates temporal black hole. Unlike human brain's spontaneous reactivation, digital system has no cue-driven recovery for sub-threshold memories.

axes.name: Graph-Topological
axes.finding: Graph connectivity provides alternative retrieval path that bypasses vector similarity, but NOT abstention. Strong graph evidence should override decay-based filtering.

axes.name: Adversarial Robustness
axes.finding: Self-induced forgetting via score distribution drift. Static threshold against growing corpus is adversarial to retention.

axes.name: Phenomenological
axes.finding: Finding the right memory ≠ returning sufficient information. No mechanism to detect 'correct but insufficient' — system measures relevance, not sufficiency.

application_map.name: Context-Prefix Embedding
application_map.delta: Disambiguates same-content-different-context memories. ~-0.04 cosine between previously-identical chunks.

application_map.name: Unified Embedding Path
application_map.delta: Layer 3.5 brute-force cosine uses consistent enriched embeddings. Eliminates score inconsistency between deferred and indexed paths.

application_map.name: Fix Importance Floor ↔ Abstention Trap
application_map.delta: Decayed memories remain retrievable when query similarity is high. Largest 'never forget' improvement.

application_map.name: Query-Type Adaptive Thresholds
application_map.delta: Prevents filtering of lexical-identifier matches. Expected +15% hit rate on identifier queries.

application_map.name: Drift-Adaptive Abstention
application_map.delta: Auto-adjusts threshold as corpus grows. Prevents gradual silent over-filtering.

application_map.name: Graph-Connected Memory Insurance
application_map.delta: Memories found via graph traversal with activation > 0.3 bypass abstention. Graph evidence overrides decay.

priority_order.rationale: Correctness bug — decayed memories permanently hidden
Trivial/low effort, eliminate inconsistency and graph-abstention conflict
Higher impact but require re-embedding or new classifier
